raw_cv_text:
Amara Okoro
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: amara.okoro@gmail.com | LinkedIn: amara-okoro | GitHub: AmaraOkoro | https://amara.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | MSc Computer Science (Systems & Networks) 2018–2020
Thesis on distributed consensus protocols for Kubernetes clusters; achieved 40% reduction in
consensus latency under Byzantine fault tolerance with custom RAFT implementation
First-class honours (3.9/4.0 GPA); recipient of the Bartle Scholarship for excellence in systems
architecture
University of Lagos | BSc Computer Science 2014–2018
Graduated with distinction (3.87/4.0 GPA); President of the ACM Student Chapter, grew membership
from 45 to 280+ members over 2 years
Capstone project: container orchestration platform for resource-constrained environments, deployed
across 12 campus servers handling 500+ concurrent users
EXPERIENCE
Datadog | Senior Site Reliability Engineer 2022–Present
Architected and deployed multi-region Kubernetes infrastructure supporting 18M+ metrics/second
ingestion; reduced P99 latency by 340ms through custom scheduler and admission controller tuning
Led incident response program across 4 SRE teams (35 people); implemented automated runbook
generation reducing MTTR by 65% (from 24 min to 8.4 min) for 120+ alert types
Designed cost optimization framework leveraging spot instances and bin-packing algorithms; saved
$4.2M annually while maintaining 99.99% SLA
Cloudflare | DevOps Engineer II 2020–2022
Operated and scaled global edge network infrastructure across 200+ data centers; increased request
throughput by 2.3x (from 28M to 64M req/sec) by optimizing BGP failover logic and reducing
convergence time from 3.2s to 0.8s
Implemented GitOps-based configuration management for 600+ microservices using ArgoCD;
reduced deployment error rate by 94% (from 3.8% to 0.22%) and deployment time to 4 minutes
Built comprehensive observability platform aggregating logs, traces, and metrics from 45K
containers; cut debugging time by 55% and reduced false-positive alerts by 71%
Wise | DevOps Engineer 2019–2020
Containerized legacy monolithic payment system serving 8M+ customers; orchestrated migration of
15 applications to Kubernetes, reducing resource footprint by 48% and server costs by $1.8M
annually
Designed and implemented disaster recovery procedures achieving RTO of 15 minutes and RPO of 5
minutes across 3 regions; conducted quarterly drills with 100% success rate
Developed custom Prometheus exporters and dashboards for infrastructure telemetry; improved
incident detection speed by 73% with advanced anomaly detection using statistical thresholding
Shopify | Infrastructure Engineer 2018–2019
Managed production Kubernetes clusters processing 2.1M transactions/day across 4,000+ nodes;
implemented custom resource quotas and network policies reducing noisy neighbor impact by 82%
Automated infrastructure provisioning using Terraform; reduced environment setup time from 6
hours to 12 minutes and eliminated 340+ manual configuration steps
Collaborated with data platform team to optimize PostgreSQL replication; increased replica
synchronization speed by 1.4x and reduced failover time from 90 seconds to 28 seconds
PROJECTS
FluxCapacity | Go, Kubernetes, ETCD, Prometheus 2021–Present
Open-source predictive auto-scaling engine for Kubernetes achieving 89% resource utilization (vs.
62% with HPA); 2.8K GitHub stars and 140+ contributors from 22 countries
Reduced scaling latency by 340ms using ML-based demand forecasting; featured in KubeCon talk
attended by 1,200+ attendees with 4.8/5.0 rating
SentryNet | Rust, eBPF, Linux kernel 2020–2022
Built low-overhead network performance monitoring tool using eBPF; deployed in production at 8
companies monitoring 40K+ endpoints with <2% CPU overhead vs. 8% for existing tools
Released 12 stable versions with 1.2K GitHub stars; achieved 15K monthly downloads from crates.io
with 96% positive user feedback
ChaosWarden | Python, Docker, Kubernetes, fault injection 2019–2020
Developed chaos engineering framework compatible with Kubernetes and Docker Swarm; automated
resilience testing for 50+ teams, identifying 340+ potential failure modes
Reduced time-to-resilience discovery by 78% vs. manual testing; 890 GitHub stars and adopted by 3
Fortune 500 companies
EXTRACURRICULAR
KubeCon Europe | Session Speaker & Track Chair 2021–2024
Delivered 4 talks on observability and chaos engineering to audiences of 800–1,200 attendees;
achieved 4.7/5.0 average rating across all sessions
Chaired 'Infrastructure at Scale' track in 2023 (12 sessions); mentored 25 emerging speakers and
increased diversity representation by 34%
Cloud Native Computing Foundation | Maintainer, Kubernetes SIG-Reliability 2020–Present
Lead maintainer for reliability best practices documentation; contributed 180+ code reviews and
merged 92 proposals from global community
Organized bi-weekly office hours attracting 40–60 engineers; built mentorship program that trained
18 junior SREs for senior roles at major tech companies
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, Rust, Bash, SQL, JavaScript
Technologies – Kubernetes, Docker, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ,
gRPC, Envoy, Terraform, ArgoCD, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD
Tools – AWS (EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, Lambda), GCP (GKE, Cloud Run, Bigtable), Azure (AKS, Cosmos
DB), Datadog, New Relic, HashiCorp suite, Vault, Consul, Linux, Git
